businessBackground: Dynacor operates a **fee-based ASM (artisanal/small-scale mining) gold-ore processing model**: it purchases ore from government-licensed Peruvian ASM miners and processes it at its wholly-owned Chala mill, selling refined gold doré bars and silver pellets internationally at market prices. The earnings driver is the **cash gross operating margin per AuEq oz** — which expands when gold prices rise (because ASM ore-purchase pricing lags spot) and contracts when gold falls. Zero exploration capex, no reserve-replacement risk, no mine-development cycle.
catalysts: Q2-2026 (~2 months): Senegal 50-tpd pilot — first ore
Each quarterly print: Sales vs $530-580M guide / NI vs $22-26M guide

flex.name: Insider Conviction
flex.rationale: 9.27% ownership + 6 open-market buys flagged; primary SEDI verification pending

flex.name: Supply/Demand Setup
flex.rationale: Gold tailwind $3,497 realized; Peru ASM regulatory regime ambiguous

flex.name: Consensus Lag
flex.rationale: 2 analysts; consensus implies +54% but own PW-FV is +132%; partial-not-frozen lag

universal.name: Mispricing Assessment
universal.rationale: +131.8% PW upside, 4-leg thesis, bounded binaries, EVIDENTIAL self-correction; Floor at-current-price prevents 6/5

universal.name: Repricing Mechanism
universal.rationale: Dated milestones (Senegal Q2-26, Ecuador Q4-26 / Q1-27) + mechanical quarterly print cadence vs guide

universal.name: Business Quality
universal.rationale: Fee-based no-exploration model, ~15% pre-tax ROIC on EV, gold tailwind; concentration risks prevent 5

universal.name: Balance Sheet & Torque (GATE)
universal.rationale: Net cash $33.5M, no debt, fully funds capex; gate cleared comfortably
